name: 3DGS Ecosystem Stack
desc: 3D Gaussian Splatting industry ecosystem map: five-layer stack from hardware foundations to end applications, covering key players in AV, robotics, real estate, VFX, GIS, and industrial digital twins. Market intelligence 2025-2026.

name: Waterloo Gas Prices
desc: Waterloo region gas prices tracker: regular, mid-grade and premium fuel price history by station and brand, sourced from GasBuddy

name: 加拿大消费积分生态圈
desc: 加拿大消费积分生态圈全景 Canadian loyalty ecosystem 2026: PC Optimum, Scene+, Triangle, Moi, Journie — 超市、药房、加油站、银行卡矩阵对比分析

name: 评估指标百科 · Evaluation Metrics
desc: 评估指标交互参考 — 混淆矩阵可拖动实验 · PR曲线面积即AP · IoU/Dice几何交互 · AP@IoU阈值 (AP50/AP75/AP@[0.5:0.95]) 完整解析。Interactive ML evaluation metrics: confusion matrix sandbox, PR curve AUC, IoU/Dice geometry, COCO AP metrics.

name: PhD Tech Tree · 3D Scene Understanding via Gaussian Splatting
desc: PhD Tech Tree — 3D Scene Understanding via Gaussian Splatting research roadmap with interactive dependency graph.

name: 植物科速查 · Plant Family Field Guide
desc: 常见植物科速查 — 中文名源、拉丁词源、模式属、野外形态特征与常见物种。Plant family field guide — Chinese name origins, Latin etymology, type genera, field morphology and common species. Covers Asteraceae, Rosaceae, Fabaceae, Poaceae, Lamiaceae, Apiaceae, Solanaceae, Rubiaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Malvaceae, Ericaceae, Rutaceae, Fagaceae, Pinaceae, Betulaceae, Salicaceae, Sapindaceae, Caprifoliaceae, Cornaceae, Violaceae, Polygonaceae, Oleaceae, Araceae, Balsaminaceae and more.

name: 孕期营养配比指南
desc: Pregnancy nutrition guide: three-phase timeline with food categories, key micronutrients, and personalized weekly tracker.

name: QAPF 双三角图 · 火成岩分类 · MattHub
desc: QAPF双三角图——IUGS标准火成岩分类，交互式悬停查看岩石标本图片与矿物成分说明。Classification of Igneous Rocks Q-A-P-F diagram, Streckeisen 1976.

name: 皮肤百科 · Skin Encyclopedia
desc: 皮肤各层结构与护肤成分机制参考 — 角质层砖墙模型、真皮层胶原蛋白与弹性蛋白、皮下脂肪体积支撑、视黄醇A醇渗透路径、防晒UVA/UVB穿透深度、细胞代谢更新周期、疤痕生长纹形成机制、毛周角化症鸡皮肤干预方案、屏障损伤循环、光老化机制。Skin anatomy cross-section — stratum corneum brick-and-mortar model, dermis collagen and elastin network, retinol penetration pathway, UVA vs UVB depth, cell turnover rates, stretch marks, keratosis pilaris treatment, barrier disruption cycle, photoaging.

name: 糖类分子百科 · Carbohydrate Encyclopedia
desc: 糖类分子百科 — 基于 SMILES 前端渲染的糖化学参考。每种糖附 RDKit 2D 结构图(带碳序号标注)、可旋转 3D Ball-and-Stick 模型、D/L 手性对映体、α/β 异头体对比,以及从原始印欧语根追溯至现代命名的完整词源。

name: 亡征 · 韩非子
desc: 《韩非子·亡征》全文分类整理，47条亡国之征，含原文、白话注释与主题分类。权臣专权，君主失德，继嗣混乱，法制废弛，军事外交失策。Han Feizi Wangzheng: 47 conditions of state collapse, annotated and categorised by theme — ruler conduct, powerful ministers, succession crises, legal decay, military overreach.
